prompt: Extremely ultra-realistic photograph — absolutely indistinguishable from a real photograph taken by an award-winning documentary photographer covering a sacred indigenous healing ceremony. No AI look whatsoever. Every detail must be photographically real. A powerful spiritual shaman healer is performing an intimate, deeply moving sacred blessing (benzeção) on another person using fresh sacred herbs. The shaman is the same exact woman from the reference images — reproduce her face with forensic accuracy: her exact facial bone structure, her natural mature skin showing real visible pores on cheeks and nose, genuine fine lines and crow's feet around her eyes, natural subtle age spots, real unretouched skin texture with slight redness and warmth. She wears the same exact colorful handmade crocheted poncho with vivid rainbow V-shaped horizontal stripes — pink, hot pink, emerald green, blue, sky blue, golden yellow, red, crimson, purple, violet, and white — with multicolored crocheted tassels along the bottom edge, and the visible handmade crocheted open-stitch yarn texture. Same white wrapped turban with the golden braided band and turquoise-green oval gemstone at the forehead. Same cowrie shell bracelet on her wrist. THE BLESSING ACT: She stands directly behind and over the person she is blessing. In both hands she holds a thick, abundant bundle of fresh green sacred herbs — rue (arruda), rosemary, guiné, basil — with visible stems, fresh leaves, and tiny flowers. She is actively pressing and brushing the herb bundle gently against the top of the person's head and running it slowly down across their shoulders and upper back in the traditional sweeping blessing motion of a Brazilian benzeção. The fresh leaves are making direct physical contact with the person's hair and shoulders — you can see individual leaves bending and pressing against the person's head. Some tiny leaf fragments have fallen onto the person's shoulders. Her face shows deep sacred concentration and spiritual gravitas — not smiling, but profoundly focused, eyes nearly closed, brow slightly furrowed in intense prayer, lips moving in whispered ancient healing words. This is a woman channeling something ancient and powerful through her entire being. THE PERSON RECEIVING: A woman seen from a three-quarter back angle, sitting on a simple wooden stool. She has natural brown hair, wearing a simple white cotton sleeveless top. Her head is deeply bowed forward in complete surrender and vulnerability, chin almost touching her chest. Her eyes are closed, tears gently rolling down one cheek — overwhelmed by the healing energy flowing through her. Her hands rest open on her lap, palms facing upward in total receptivity. Her skin also shows real photographic detail — visible arm hair, natural skin texture, a small mole on her shoulder. ENVIRONMENT AND ENERGY: They are in a lush tropical garden. Real green plants, ferns, and palm fronds surround them, creating a natural sacred space. A thin, delicate wisp of white smoke from burning sage or palo santo rises in a gentle spiral nearby, catching the golden light — adding authenticity to the ritual. The golden hour sunlight filters softly through the tropical foliage, creating warm dappled light patches on both figures. A very subtle, almost imperceptible warm golden luminous glow exists in the space between the shaman's herb bundle and the person's head — just barely visible, like heat shimmer, suggesting the transfer of sacred healing energy. This energy effect must be EXTREMELY subtle and natural-looking, as if it could be explained by the angle of the sunlight. The overall atmosphere is intimate, sacred, emotionally overwhelming, and deeply human. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 85mm lens, f/2.0, ISO 250. Camera at eye level, three-quarter angle showing the shaman's profile and focused expression alongside the bowed person. Shallow depth of field with both figures tack-sharp and the garden background dissolving into soft warm green and golden bokeh. Natural color grading with warm golden tones. This is photojournalism of the sacred — the Benção Sagrada do Cantuá captured in its most raw, authentic, and emotionally powerful moment.
negative_prompt: anatomy normalization, body proportion averaging, plastic skin, airbrushed texture, stylized realism, CGI, 3d render, illustration, painterly, cartoon, anime, beauty filter, AI look, digital art, concept art, overexposed, blurry face, extra fingers, deformed hands, missing fingers, different clothing, different poncho, plain poncho, solid color poncho, different turban, different person as shaman, different face on shaman, studio lighting, artificial lighting, flash photography, ring light, indoor studio, male shaman, child, dark mood, cold lighting, blue tones, harsh shadows, unflattering angle, excessive energy effects, fantasy effects, magic spells, fire, lightning, electric bolts, neon colors, glowing eyes, aura outlines, dead leaves, dry herbs, wilted plants, angry expression, scary, horror, both facing camera, selfie, posed photo, stock photo, commercial look, perfect skin, flawless skin, porcelain skin, smooth skin, no pores
